name: Salmon with Asparagus Sauce
recipeInstructions:
For the Sauce:
============== Wash and trim asparagus, keeping tops separate. Cook asparagus tops in a large pot of salted boiling water until tender but still firm. Drain thoroughly.
Process asparagus tops with butter for 3-4 minutes until smooth, scraping sides frequently.
Simmer asparagus ends with cream for 20 minutes, then strain gently.
Combine cooked asparagus, remaining sauce, and butter; heat just below boiling point. Adjust seasoning to taste.
To Assemble:
============ Season salmon steaks with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a heavy enamel or copper saute pan over medium heat.
When butter is browned, add salmon and cook one side 30 seconds.
Remove from heat, carefully flip, and let cook for another 30 seconds on the hot pan.
Transfer salmon to a towel to drain.
Just before serving, drizzle sauce onto plates and place cooked salmon on top. Serve immediately.
